Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0BB8 "RASTERSCAN-0A00-0BB8" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0a00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rasterscan.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0A00 to set the current device number ($BA) to $01 (tape) to allow the game to run correctly.
